MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY BOB DOUGLASS FOR DEFENDANT KAREN MONGE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR.TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT TO MOVE BY 9/27/05. ALL RENT FORGIVEN UNLESS THERE IS A SUBSTANTIAL NUISANCE INCLUDING WATER AND FIRE DAMAGE. PARTIES GIVE UP RIGHT TO JURY TRIAL. DEFENDANT TO REMOVE ALL PERSONAL PROPERTy.ANY REMAINING PROPERTY CAN BE THROWN AWAY BY PLAINTIFF. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO A FULL RELEASE PER 1542CC. IF DEFENDANT VACATES, PLAINITFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. IF THE DEFENDANT DEFAULTS ON AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF TO APPLY FOR JUDGMENT, WITH 2 COURT DAYS NOTICE. JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE RENT DUE AND $500 FOR SHERIFF FEES.

JUDGE PRO TEM:MICHAEL G W LEE ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:JOANN BRYCE(218)
